notes: Three NEW review papers selected (not used in prior reports): 1 Edge AI review, 1 Edge AI Security review (FL security), 1 Embedded Systems Security review. All reports in Traditional Chinese with detailed taxonomy, method explanations, pros/cons, mainstream methods, extension directions, figure screenshots, and credibility assessments.
